title: Cursor Dynamic Workflows
description: Use Cursor as an MCP host for you-agent-factory Factory Session and dynamic-workflow tools.
openingSummary: Connect Cursor to you-agent-factory over MCP so you can drive Factory Session and dynamic-workflow tools from the editor.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: Cursor dynamic workflows use Cursor as an MCP host that calls you-agent-factory Factory Session and dynamic-workflow tools through you mcp serve.

whenToUse.title: When To Use
whenToUse.body: Use this guide when you want to author or drive JavaScript or TypeScript dynamic workflows from Cursor over MCP.

stepsOrWorkflow.title: Steps Or Workflow
stepsOrWorkflow.body: Configure Cursor MCP for you mcp serve, reload Cursor, then run a first validate and start or status loop from Factory Session tools.

commonPitfalls.title: Common Pitfalls
commonPitfalls.body: Common setup mistakes include a missing you binary on PATH, the wrong project cwd, and forgetting to reload Cursor after MCP config changes.
